name: Bug report
about: Report a conversion that failed, produced a wrong or corrupt file, or crashed

ConvertIA is fully offline and best-effort, with no support SLA (see SECURITY.md and README.md).
Do NOT report security vulnerabilities here — use private reporting (Security tab -> Report a vulnerability).
